AI Engineering Manager

View all jobs
Sydney NSW (Hybrid)
Consultants (Information & Communication Technology)
Full time
Add expected salary to your profile for insights
Posted 2d ago
Quick apply
We're partnering with a growing consultancy seeking a AI Engineering Manager to help organisations unlock the value of AI, automation, and digital transformation. This is a senior leadership role combining executive advisory, commercial growth, solution shaping, and delivery oversight across various clients.
You'll work closely with C-suite stakeholders to identify opportunities, develop AI-enabled transformation strategies, shape complex engagements, and ensure successful delivery outcomes. You'll also play a key role in growing the practice through capability development, reusable offerings, and strategic account expansion.

Key Responsibilities
  • Lead executive conversations around AI, automation, and digital transformation
  • Facilitate discovery workshops and shape innovative, outcome-driven solutions
  • Support the development of proposals, business cases, and Statements of Work
  • Identify growth opportunities within existing and prospective client accounts
  • Provide governance and oversight across complex transformation programs
  • Contribute to AI offerings, thought leadership, and go-to-market initiatives
  • Mentor consultants and help build a high-performing practice
About You
  • Experience leading enterprise technology, AI, or digital transformation initiatives
  • Strong consulting, stakeholder management, and executive engagement skills
  • Commercially minded, with experience supporting business growth and account expansion
  • Background in AI, Generative AI, Automation, Data & Analytics, Enterprise Architecture, or Technology Consulting
  • Able to translate technical capabilities into measurable business outcomes
Why Join?
  • Influence AI strategy and transformation programs for enterprise clients
  • Work across cutting-edge AI, automation, and digital initiatives
  • Play a key role in shaping and growing a consulting practice
  • Combine strategic advisory, commercial leadership, and delivery ownership in one role
